decision.summary: No position management is needed and no new BTC entry is allowed this cycle.
decision.rationale: There are no open positions to close or reduce. The latest Beecthor transcript and summaries still describe a broader bearish thesis with a corrective upside attempt toward 74k before renewed downside, while Binance at 71160.61 shows price still below that upside target and only mildly weak on the day. Although the nearest bullish daily market on April 9 is the 72k reach at 47.0%, the playbook’s binding rule says no new Beecthor video means no bet, so no new position can be opened.
